title: PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTAU) Graduate Teaching Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website pjtsau.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Graduate Teaching Assistant.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Graduate Teaching Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for this post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for this post is B.Sc (Ag.).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 32,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 02 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type?
faq.answer: The job type is Contract.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview take place?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will take place in Rudrur, Telangana. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.
